CustomField.formula: FTE_Post_No_Mgrs_Dirs_Sr_Officials__c + FTE_Post_No_Bus_Pub_Eng_Tech_Prof__c + FTE_Post_No_Assoc_Prof_Bus_Eng_Etc__c + FTE_Post_No_Admin_Sales_Cust_Serv_Ops__c + FTE_Post_No_Skilled_Trades_Occs__c + FTE_Post_No_Other_Role_Categories__c + FTE_Post_No_Role_Unknown__c
CustomField.label: Total FTE Posts - Summed Occupation
